planned_replacements.src/semantic_ai_washing/data/extract_sam: Replace raw filing copying with source index + bounded filing manifests.
planned_replacements.src/semantic_ai_washing/data/extract_ai_: Replace per-filing *_ai_sentences.txt outputs with year-partitioned sentence tables.

canonical_entrypoints.doc_summary: Aggregate per-file classification outputs into firm-year features.
Merge AI sentence frequencies (firm-year) with patents (firm-year).
Batch classifier for AI-related sentences using SentenceBERT and cosine similarity.
Build a reproducible firm list (~50 CIKs) that **have a 10‑K in each year 2021–2024**
Index the external SEC corpus and emit source-window metadata.
Pull Compustat controls from WRDS, build a CIK↔GVKEY crosswalk for your 50 firms,
Phase 0 diagnostics baseline runner for Iteration 1.
CLI entrypoint for the autonomous director package.
Generate a repo script inventory and a human-readable script registry.
Generate a canonical registry for current validation assets.
Create adjudication artifacts and optionally merge final IRR labels.
Build Phase 1 labeling sample with leakage controls and stable IDs.
Compute IRR metrics (Cohen's kappa + disagreement taxonomy).
Deduplicate and merge labeled datasets for Phase 1.
Prepare a stratified IRR subset and blinded rater templates.
QA checks for Phase 1 expanded labeled dataset.
Builds a normalized company lookup table for patents work.

modules.doc_summary: Aggregate per-file classification outputs into firm-year features.
Merge AI sentence frequencies (firm-year) with patents (firm-year).
Summarize classification counts for each AI sentence file.
Batch classifier for AI-related sentences using SentenceBERT and cosine similarity.
Compute label centroids from MPNet embeddings.
Embed labeled sentences using the stronger MPNet model.
Core sentence classification utilities for AI-washing labeling.
Core sentence filtering utilities for extracting AI-related sentences
Build a reproducible firm list (~50 CIKs) that **have a 10‑K in each year 2021–2024**

modules.rationale: canonical implementation kept operational while target data architecture is built
modules.doc_summary: Filter AI-related sentences from EDGAR filings.
modules.notes: Current implementation writes per-filing *_ai_sentences.txt review files. Target architecture promotes year-partitioned sentence tables.

modules.rationale: canonical implementation kept operational while target data architecture is built
modules.doc_summary: Collect 10-K filing text for a firm list & year range, without overwriting.
modules.replacement_path: source index + bounded filing manifest against SEC_SOURCE_DIR

modules.doc_summary: Index the external SEC corpus and emit source-window metadata.
Pull Compustat controls from WRDS, build a CIK↔GVKEY crosswalk for your 50 firms,
Phase 0 diagnostics baseline runner for Iteration 1.
Document ingestion adapters for markdown/txt/docx strategic files.
CLI entrypoint for the autonomous director package.
Audit trail helpers (append-only JSONL + record hashing).
Configuration and path loading for the director package.
Cost budget enforcement and usage tracking.
Blocker taxonomy and ranked recovery decision engine.
Gate evaluation logic for runbook execution.
Optional LLM refinement for generated plans and runbooks.
Deterministic optimization and next-work recommendation engine.
Rendering helpers for canonical roadmap views and optimization outputs.
Load and query the canonical roadmap model.
Deterministic condition sensors for task readiness and execution checks.
State compiler for current repository + iteration snapshots.
Task and phase graph compilation helpers.
Shared utilities for director core modules.
Pydantic schemas for the autonomous project director.
Generate a repo script inventory and a human-readable script registry.
Generate a canonical registry for current validation assets.
Create adjudication artifacts and optionally merge final IRR labels.
Build Phase 1 labeling sample with leakage controls and stable IDs.
Shared helpers for label expansion and dataset hygiene.
Compute IRR metrics (Cohen's kappa + disagreement taxonomy).
Deduplicate and merge labeled datasets for Phase 1.
Prepare a stratified IRR subset and blinded rater templates.
QA checks for Phase 1 expanded labeled dataset.
Builds a normalized company lookup table for patents work.
Defines a basic set of AI-related patent keywords and saves them to a text file.
Extracts AI-related patents by matching keywords and company names from local patent data.
Extracts AI-related patent counts per firm-year using disambiguated assignee names from PatentsView data.
Extracts AI-related patent counts by firm and year using real PatentsView data.
Filters patent_assignee.tsv to extract patent_ids linked to your companies of interest.
